detail.description:
Discover the latest sensation from CookieRun - the IP beloved by 200 million fans worldwide!
This real-time battle action reaches thrilling new heights.
Welcome to the world of CookieRun: OvenSmash!

Join the Cookies gathering in Platter City 
Watch as they clash in epic battles to make their wishes come true 
Step into an urban fantasy world of Cookies like nothing you've ever imagined!
Fight with everything you've got to fulfill your wish! 

1. Immersive Urban Fantasy
Battle it out in a stunni
detail.recentChanges:
Welcome to CookieRun: OvenSmash!
What's new:
– New version update
– Ranked Mode added
– User experience optimizations
Update now to enjoy the latest improvements!
